PowerShell($proj = "c:\\Work Space\\automation-and-scheduling-of-functions-in-an-existing-program"; $iscc = "C:\\Users\\Administrator\\AppData\\Local\\Programs\\Inno Setup 6\\ISCC.exe"; Push-Location $proj; & $iscc install_script.iss 2>&1 | Out-File -Encoding utf8 "$proj\\_build\\iscc.log"; $code = $LASTEXITCODE; Pop-Location; "ISCC ExitCode: $code"; Get-Content "$proj\\_build\\iscc.log" -Tail 4; ""; if \(Test-Path "$proj\\HousoftMeta_Setup.exe"\) { $f = Get-Item "$proj\\HousoftMeta_Setup.exe"; "NEW installer: {0} bytes \({1:F1} MB\) built {2}" -f $f.Length, \($f.Length/1MB\), $f.LastWriteTime } else { "INSTALLER NOT PRODUCED" })

PowerShell($proj = "c:\\Work Space\\automation-and-scheduling-of-functions-in-an-existing-program"; if \(Test-Path "$proj\\HousoftMeta_Setup.exe"\) { $new = Get-Item "$proj\\HousoftMeta_Setup.exe"; $prev = Get-Item "$proj\\_build\\HousoftMeta_Setup.previous.exe"; "NEW:      {0:N0} bytes \({1:F2} MB\)  built {2:HH:mm:ss}" -f $new.Length, \($new.Length/1MB\), $new.LastWriteTime; "Previous: {0:N0} bytes \({1:F2} MB\)  \(yesterday's build, kept as backup\)" -f $prev.Length, \($prev.Length/1MB\); "Delta:    {0:+#,##0;-#,##0} bytes" -f \($new.Length - $prev.Length\) } else { "INSTALLER NOT PRODUCED" }; ""; "core/click_sequences.pyc size change \(yesterday's bundle -> today's bundle\):"; $oldClick = \(Get-Item "$proj\\_build\\verify_new_bundle\\HousoftMeta.exe_extracted\\PYZ.pyz_extracted\\core\\click_sequences.pyc"\).Length; "  $oldClick bytes \(now\)  vs  8841 bytes \(yesterday\)  delta = $\($oldClick - 8841\)")
